programme.title: The Key of David
programme.desc: Religious documentary, analysing current events using Bible prophecy

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team is called to a football stadium, where the skeletal remains of a gang member have been dug up. As the detectives start bagging evidence, a chance discovery puts Danny's job on the line. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise, Melina Kanakaredes and Carmine Giovinazzo

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and Lindsay investigate the fatal shooting of singer Kid Rock's chauffeur, whose body has been found backstage by a fan. The case proves baffling, and as events unfold, a second murder takes place - in Stella's apartment. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise, Anna Belknap and Melina Kanakaredes

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and Stella try to establish why two women have made conflicting claims to be the wife of a murder victim, and make a surprising discovery about the circumstances of their relationships. Meanwhile, Danny and Lindsay investigate the killing of a woman found near a dock, tangled up in seaweed and dressed as a mermaid. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise and Melina Kanakaredes

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: Walter's parents and the team visit Megan in hospital as her health deteriorates, but end up quarantined when a deadly fungus outbreak threatens to infect everyone

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: Members of the team go undercover at university to find a hacker putting the world economy at risk. Walter tries to prove he was not to blame for Ray's partner's death

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The agents investigate the murder of a marine during a cruise. They discover he came from a famous and wealthy family but had turned his back on a life of privilege to join the military, and after the death of his father had inherited a large part of his business. His decision to change his will may have pushed one of his relatives to kill him to keep the firm in their control. Crime drama, guest-starring Diane Neal (Law & Order: Special Victims Unit)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A US Navy recruitment officer is murdered at a high school and the agents discover he had recently begun a relationship with a married teacher whose wife held a grudge against him. They also find out a student's father was vehemently opposed to his joining the military, and receive help from an unexpected quarter - Ducky's esteemed predecessor, Dr Magnus. Crime drama, guest starring comedian Bob Newhart

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A former serviceman who had been having an affair is beaten to death in his own back garden, and the agents are forced to consider the possibility that his wife - a US Marine and martial arts expert - is the killer. Meanwhile, McGee becomes the subject of an embarrassing mix-up when an inflatable doll apparently purchased on his credit card is delivered. Crime drama, starring Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The agents are forced to undergo psychological evaluations conducted by Dr Rachel Cranston (guest star Wendy Makkena) while investigating the death of a submarine's commanding officer. Suspicion falls on a journalist seen arguing with the man before his demise, and Tony discovers a link between the psychotherapist shadowing the agents and Ziva's predecessor Kate Todd. Crime drama, starring Mark Harmon and Michael Weatherly

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A marine dies while saving the life of a foreign defence secretary, who was the target of an assassination attempt. Gibbs and the team are given the task of protecting the politician's daughter while she studies in America, but fail to stop her being kidnapped and ransomed in a bid to prevent her father signing an important treaty. Crime drama, starring Sean Murray and Michael Weatherly

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: Walter's parents and the team visit Megan in hospital as her health deteriorates, but end up quarantined when a deadly fungus outbreak threatens to infect everyone

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: Members of the team go undercover at university to find a hacker putting the world economy at risk. Walter tries to prove he was not to blame for Ray's partner's death

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A blogger who accused the NCIS of a cover-up is found dead, and Gibbs and his team are forced to reopen a closed case to find the killer. However, state police suspect the special agents may have been involved in the murder and take control of the investigation. Mark Harmon, David McCallum, Cote de Pablo, Michael Weatherly and Pauley Perrette star

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team investigates the death of a marine off the coast of Tanzania - a case complicated by the discovery that he had a link to Ziva. The mystery deepens even further with the recovery of wreckage from a sunken freighter. Starring Mark Harmon, Cote de Pablo, David McCallum, Michael Weatherly and Pauley Perrette

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The agents investigate the Halloween murder of a marine with a fondness for playing practical jokes. As the evidence accumulates, they begin to suspect he was killed by the exasperated victim of one of his pranks. Drama, starring Mark Harmon, David McCallum, Cote de Pablo, Michael Weatherly and Pauley Perrette

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The bodies of two dishonourably discharged officers are found on board a boat belonging to Gibbs, and inquiries cast suspicion on his mentor, retired agent Mike Franks. The case proves to have wider implications - and the team finds itself battling to prevent an international confrontation. Starring Mark Harmon, David McCallum, Cote de Pablo, Michael Weatherly and Pauley Perrette

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team delves into Vance's troubled past in a desperate effort to trap a vengeful female assassin named Lee Wuan Kai. Although she is determined to strike back at him by targeting his family, it gradually transpires that there is another deeper motive for her crimes. Crime drama, guest starring Kelly Hu, with Mark Harmon, Rocky Carroll and Pauley Perrette

programme.desc: Walter's parents and the team visit Megan in hospital as her health deteriorates, but end up quarantined when a deadly fungus outbreak threatens to infect everyone

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: A doctor with a history of raping and murdering teenage girls leads Allison to the discovery of an evil soul that possesses the living and drives them to unspeakable acts. Joe leaps to the defence of Ariel, who has been accused of cheating by her teacher

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: A Russian captain, trying to settle an old score during a war games exercise, turns his ship's guns on his former Cold War enemy, putting Harm, Mac and Bud in grave danger. Drama, starring David James Elliot

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: The lifeguards look back on previous seasons and their careers, explaining the serious side of the job, as well as the more light-hearted opportunities it presents

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and Danny raise questions over the murder of a US Marine corporal found stabbed to death in Central Park. A case of mistaken identity arises as Stella, Lindsay and Dr Hawkes investigate a body in a burnt-out car, and Sheldon makes a surprising discovery after creating a facial reconstruction from the skull. With Gary Sinise, Melina Kanakaredes and Carmine Giovinazzo

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A bomb detonates during a routine investigation into the murder of a security guard, leaving Flack barely conscious and with serious injuries. The team links the two incidents and races to stay one step ahead of the bomber, who contacts Mac to tell him he has been singled out as the next victim. Melina Kanakaredes, Carmine Giovinazzo, Vanessa Ferlito and Eddie Cahill star

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A hospital patient recovering from a hit-and-run incident dies in suspicious circumstances, but a delirious homeless woman who believes she has witnessed God performing a mercy killing could hold the key to the murder investigation. First-ever episode of the detective drama, starring Dick Van Dyke

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: The team must prevent a catastrophe when torrential rain creates a huge crack in a dam, threatening to wipe out a whole town on Christmas Eve, while Walter's grief finally gets the better of him

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: The agents have to save a stricken US Special Forces unit - but to do so, they must survive the freezing temperatures of Antarctica

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Petty officer Jody Ray is killed by a hit-and-run driver and evidence points to staff sergeant Justin Dunne, whose guilt seems certain when DiNozzo and McGee find him washing a bloodstained knife when they go to arrest him. However, Dunne tells his lawyer Carrie Clark he was miles away in Falls Church at the time - stabbing bookmaker Donny Sullivan to death. Unable to reveal the truth to the NCIS team, Clark decides to check out the alibi herself. Crime drama, guest starring Salli Richardson-Whitfield (A Town Called Eureka)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: An internal security breach forces NCIS to go into lockdown when a covert listening device is found in a pen belonging to Secretary of the Navy Sarah Porter. DiNozzo discovers that National Security Agency analyst Ellie Bishop wrote a report two years previously predicting the possibility of such an occurrence and she is brought in to assist with the investigation and track down the culprit. Guest starring Leslie Hope and Emily Wickersham

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team is called in to investigate when marine corporal Flegman is found shot to death, and a phone leads them to a hotel room where Gibbs awkwardly stumbles upon his ex-wife Diane Sterling and her FBI agent ex-husband TC Fornell. She had been attempting to call her boyfriend Eddie to break up with him, but somehow Flegman had taken possession of his phone. The team tracks down Eddie's car and discovers a clown nose along with traces of blood and he quickly becomes the prime suspect

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team investigates when a mysterious, fast-spreading illness strikes children from military families. While Gibbs tries to determine the cause, Abby and Jimmy partner with the Naval Medical Research Centre in the hope of delivering a cure before the holidays. Mark Harmon stars

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A petty officer is killed by a stolen surveillance drone and the team links it to elusive terrorist Benham Parsa. NCIS joins forces with the Department of Defence to track down the device before it is used for a large-scale attack, but Gibbs is less than pleased that he has to work with his ex-lover Hollis Mann. Meanwhile, McGee hopes he will be granted time off to attend a black-tie gala honouring his girlfriend Delilah. Guest starring Susanna Thompson (Arrow)

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: The team must prevent a catastrophe when torrential rain creates a huge crack in a dam, threatening to wipe out a whole town on Christmas Eve, while Walter's grief finally gets the better of him

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: Callen and Sam meet up with former colleague Mike Renko, who is back in town on the trail of a civilian militia he thinks is responsible for the theft of anti-tank missiles from a Navy base. Their discussion is interrupted by Hetty with footage of a man being strangled at an aquarium - and the victim is identified as a lance corporal who was Renko's inside man at the group

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: The team is called in to investigate the murder of an engineer working on highly sensitive submarine technology, but find the crime scene clean of evidence. Forensic scientist Abby Sciuto travels from the NCIS office in Washington, DC to help out as the case has similarities to a serial killer she has been tracking. Guest starring Pauley Perrette

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: Callen and Sam investigate when former marine Asher Ross is killed by an explosive device hidden in his mobile phone. Because of the sophisticated nature of the bomb, suspicion falls on the members of the ordnance disposal unit Ross was part of in Iraq, but further enquiries reveal that they are being targeted as well

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: A Navy officer dies following a confrontation involving a dancer and a Sudanese emigre at a strip club. However, when investigations reveal he was a code-breaker involved in naval intelligence, Callen and Sam dig deeper and gradually unearth links to Safar, a Libyan-born terrorist known to recruit on behalf of al-Qaeda. Henri Lubatti guest stars

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: A taxi driver recently released from prison is murdered just hours after sending an e-mail to an old alias that Callen used when he went undercover to investigate three marines who stole $5million. Resuming the persona, Callen goes in search of the gang, one of whom is killed in a drive-by shooting

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Harm is called to prosecute a CPO for the murder of his wife's paramour. On the other side of the bench, Mac tries to prove his story that despite a history of physical abuse, the accused is not a murderer. Drama, starring David James Elliott

Drama, starring David Caruso and Emily Procter

Drama, starring Mark Harmon, David McCallum, Cote de Pablo, Michael Weatherly and Pauley Perrette

Crime drama, starring Chris O'Donell and LL Cool J

programme.desc: A jet carrying a fortune in bank funds crashes into a residential area, killing everyone on board. programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The team investigates a video games company when one of its testers is found dead. While the victim appears to have been killed in a car crash, it transpires he was murdered beforehand - and has had his foot cut off to conceal the cause of death. A former porn star who was involved in a previous case comes looking for protection from a former producer who is trying to blackmail her. Guest starring Kerr Smith (Dawson's Creek) and professional skateboarder Tony Hawk

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio investigates the deaths of two tax inspectors who were killed on the same day - one shot in his car and the other gunned down by the owner of a yacht that he was trying to repossess. programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio investigates the murder of a woman working for a dating agency, and although suspicion initially falls on an angry client, DNA testing reveals the killer was female. Elsewhere, Delko loses his badge and sets out to find it before it falls into the wrong hands

programme.title: CSI: Miami

programme.title: Cadfael
programme.desc: The monks cause a storm of resentment by launching an expedition to a Welsh village to recover the bones of St Winifred and return them to the abbey. As if that does not make them unpopular enough, a local landowner dies in mysterious circumstances and it is up to Brother Cadfael to clear his colleagues of murder and ensure they get out of the country alive. Medieval mystery, starring Derek Jacobi, Michael Culver, John Hallam and Anna Friel

programme.title: Where the Heart Is
programme.desc: Election fever grips Skelthwaite, but Simon finds his opponent more formidable and devious than the weedy kid he used to bully at school. Karen's mother Linda is becoming a burden at the Buckley home, but a rethink is needed when it emerges she has a serious medical problem, and David finds himself embroiled in Conrad Walker's spurious business empire with no hope of backing out. Meanwhile, Beth uncovers Anita's beauty secrets and plans to make things difficult for estranged husband Stewart

programme.title: Where the Heart Is
programme.desc: A good-looking newcomer sets hearts a-flutter among the women of Skelthwaite, but behind the handsome exterior lies a troubled mind. Meanwhile, Linda reveals she needs an urgent operation that will cost 10,000 pounds, and son-in-law David vows to get her the money, but may not be entirely truthful about her illness. Drama, starring Leslie Ash, Lesley Dunlop, Tony Haygarth and Lee Warburton

programme.title: Sharpe
programme.desc: Richard Sharpe becomes a pawn in a French plan to retain control of Spain, and finds himself facing execution for murder. Determined to regain his honour, he undertakes a dangerous quest to find the only person capable of clearing his name. Adaptation of Bernard Cornwell's novel, starring Sean Bean

programme.title: Auf Wiedersehen, Pet
programme.desc: Fraser calls off his goons and agrees to let the Magnificent Seven stay in the manor house rent-free, while Oz encounters a lady who is keen to make the most of his company. Morag Hood guest stars, with Jimmy Nail

programme.title: Auf Wiedersehen, Pet
programme.desc: Work at Thornley Manor is over and the lads take a break before leaving for Spain. Oz uses the opportunity to visit home and hits on the barmy idea of kidnapping his son, determined to prevent him from being taken overseas by his wife Marjorie - but makes the mistake of roping Wayne in to help

programme.title: Rosemary & Thyme
programme.desc: Green-fingered amateur detectives Laura and Rosemary are called in to tackle a stubborn species of weed threatening an entire year's vintage at the Crickle Valley vineyard. However, they find themselves in the right place at the right time when the body of a wine critic is discovered on the premises. Murder mystery, starring Felicity Kendal and Pam Ferris

programme.title: Rosemary & Thyme
programme.desc: The amateur sleuths are called to a monastery to restore a herb garden in time for a royal visit - but their pruning and planting is disrupted by the discovery of a corpse. As they investigate the death, the tight-knit community closes in around them. Mystery drama, starring Felicity Kendal and Pam Ferris

programme.title: Rosemary & Thyme
programme.desc: The duo help reorganise the seed museum owned by the descendants of famous botanist Edwin Pargeter - but it is not long before a man is found dead in the family's garden. In an effort to trace his killer, Rosemary involves colleagues from the Royal Horticultural Society at Kew Gardens, and soon the race is on to identify a batch of mysterious seeds before it falls into the wrong hands. Felicity Kendal and Pam Ferris star

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: Shepherd and his team are confronted with the sight of a Santa Claus with a slit throat. The victim is actually much-loved local mayor Evan Whitestone, who had dressed as Santa every year for the Christmas parade. Suspicion soon turns to the four rivals for his mayoral chains in a forthcoming election. Neill Rea and Fern Sutherland star

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The priest investigates when the new wife of Sir Raleigh is found dead in a locked room after seeing an Egyptian mummy. Crime drama, starring Mark Williams

programme.title: WPC 56
programme.desc: Max and Fenton investigate a spate of counterfeit notes, and wonder if it is a coincidence that pickpocket Brody suddenly seems well-off. Meanwhile, Gina is put forward for a risky assignment, and the outcome of the boxing match leaves everyone reeling

programme.title: Taggart
programme.desc: An informant is due to give evidence against his former boss, one of Glasgow's most powerful gang leaders - but police fail to get the witness to court. Drama, with Mark McManus, Blythe Duff and James MacPherson. Co-star Gray O'Brien makes one of six appearances in the series, years before playing Tony Gordon in Coronation Street. More recently he popped up in The Loch, and Shakespeare & Hathaway: Private Investigators. Director Richard Holthouse went on to helm several episodes of Midsomer Murders

programme.title: Auf Wiedersehen, Pet

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: When three teenagers collapse after taking uncut cocaine, Diane and Sally are sent to visit the school they all attend. There they break up a fight and further investigations reveal the two girls involved are both caught up in the local drugs scene as suppliers. Grace makes a momentous decision about her career and Phil drops a bombshell on his Sun Hill colleagues

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Former Footballers' Wives star Ben Richards joins the cast as PC Nate Roberts, a seasoned professional with an appetite for action and an eye for the ladies. Meanwhile, Phil Hunter clears his desk and prepares to move on, convinced none of his Sun Hill colleagues except Sam will give him a second thought. Diane is shocked to encounter an old army pal living in a squat with his girlfriend, who has been injured in a crack den fire

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Part one of two. A paranoid schizophrenic is the main suspect in the case of a prowler who attacked a woman and then stabbed Reg, who answered the call for help. Neil recognises the man as someone he arrested four years previously, and takes pity on him when it emerges he did not receive appropriate medical help at the time and has since been victimised by neighbours on his estate

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Part two of two. Schizophrenic Michael Simms threatens Shelley Cooper with a knife and when the woman is later killed, Neil orders CO19 to shoot him, assuming Simms is the culprit. In the subsequent inquiry by the Department of Professional Standards, the DI's judgement is called into question by his own superior officer and he faces the prospect that his career could be over

programme.title: Bramwell
programme.desc: Drama set in 1895, chronicling the personal and professional consequences of Eleanor Bramwell's determined quest to become the first female surgeon at the East London Hospital. The first episode sees Eleanor embarking on her medical career _ and immediately crossing swords with eminent surgeon Sir Herbert Hamilton. Jemma Redgrave stars in the title role, with David Calder as her father, and Robert Hardy as Sir Herbert

programme.title: Bramwell
programme.desc: Eleanor opens her new infirmary for the poor, but also agrees to help in her father's private practice. Period drama, starring Jemma Redgrave

programme.title: Bramwell
programme.desc: Eleanor and Nurse Carr carry out tuberculosis tests in the East End slums, while Robert's electro-therapy treatment causes problems. Period drama, starring Jemma Redgrave

programme.title: Catherine Cookson's The Glass Virgin
programme.desc: Feature-length drama from the pen of the popular storyteller. A woman runs away from her wealthy family after she discovers a shocking secret about her past. Nigel Havers, Emily Mortimer and Brendan Coyle star

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: Poplar is gripped by an outbreak of dysentery, but that's the least of mum-to-be Marie Amos's worries when her husband Tony is arrested for gross indecency in the gentlemen's toilets and faces a criminal hearing. Nurse Crane meets Dolores McEvoy, a pregnant Irish woman who is clearly malnourished - but when she visits the woman's home, it turns out she has given a false address and has disappeared. Trixie is delighted when Tom asks her to oversee her first official church duty since their engagement, while at Nonnatus House, Fred tackles a rat infestation - only for Sister Monica Joan to work against him. With guest appearances by Cara Theobold (Downton Abbey) and Richard Fleeshman (Coronation Street)

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: Sister Winifred's eyes are opened to Poplar's seedy underworld when she cares for expectant prostitute Bridget Cole. Horrified by the young woman's lack of awareness, she draws on her teaching experience, and with help from Sgt Noakes sets out to promote safe sex to all local working girls. Barbara struggles to understand why expectant father Frank Robbins would pressure his wife to bear him a son, while Sister Monica Joan is feeling sidelined - until she finds herself unexpectedly assisting Shelagh with an emergency birth. Trixie invites herself along to a meeting between Tom and the Bishop - but things get tense when the idea of the couple moving to Newcastle is raised

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The islanders batten down the hatches as a hurricane approaches Saint Marie - but the police can't take cover as they're called to another murder, this time at the local university. The victim is a meteorologist, whose death has been staged to look like an accident - and the plot thickens when it emerges he had something important to tell the dean but died before he got the chance. To confuse matters, all his colleagues seem to have a reason for wanting him dead. Can the team unmask the culprit before the storm hits? Ben Miller and Sara Martins star, with Gavin & Stacey actor Mathew Horne

programme.title: Zen
programme.desc: An aristocrat's death leads Zen into the shadowy world of the Cabal, a secret organisation that appears to have infiltrated many of Italy's biggest institutions - and when the detective comes under pressure to close the case as a suicide, he realises he is making some very powerful enemies. Meanwhile, Moscati struggles to cope with the mounting stresses of his job, and Zen tries to further his relationship with Tania - only to receive romantic overtures from an unexpected source. Drama, starring Rufus Sewell, Caterina Murino and Stanley Townsend

programme.title: Taggart
programme.desc: Investigating the mysterious death of a youngster at an elite Glasgow school, Burke incurs the wrath of the local press and finds himself branded a bully for his rough tactics. Ross goes undercover and soon discovers links with the shady world of drug-dealing. Drama, starring Blythe Duff and Alex Norton

programme.title: The Heart Guy
programme.desc: Hugh is facing his biggest crisis yet when his love life, career and family are all in desperate need of a help. Also, Charlie plays dirty to win back Matt

programme.title: The Heart Guy
programme.desc: Hugh and the hospital staff use blackmail to get rid of their incompetent boss Norah, while Penny faces family and romantic dilemmas that will change her future

programme.title: Monarch of the Glen
programme.desc: An old friend of the Macdonald family arrives in Glenbogle, but while Archie is pleased to see him, Lexie is concerned about his drinking problem and becomes suspicious when he asks for money to invest in his business. Meanwhile, Molly's attempt to save a wolf cub from death is accidentally frustrated by Kilwillie

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: When Diane's neighbour is knocked unconscious with an iron, it looks as if his wife is escaping from an abusive marriage, but all is not as it seems. Meanwhile, Smithy and Nate answer a call from a man who has been sold fake raffle tickets, but the teenage mum accused of the crime impresses the coppers enough to earn a second chance to sort out her life

programme.title: Holby City
programme.desc: Having proved himself a committed leader during the floods, Mark is accepted for the CEO job, and immediately responds by trying to prove he will still carry out his duties as a working member of the medical team. Connie panics when Kevin confronts her with evidence of her lies about Elaine's treatment, an enthusiastic new nurse puts Donna to shame, and a porter causes chaos around the hospital on his last day of work

programme.title: Casualty
programme.desc: Luke warns Bex of the police's suspicions as security guard Colin comes under pressure, and the terrified receptionist is eager to listen to his plan. Claire is distraught when her boyfriend leaves during Pete's funeral, and phones Will to update him on the pair's intentions. Guppy plays detective to discover whether his father's claims that Harry is involved in the drugs trial are true

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Sid Owen guest stars as the limo driver of a fading pop star who is suspected of raping a student found unconscious in an alley by Reg and Tony. Elsewhere, Smithy encounters Leanne Samuels again, only to learn she has lost her job after taking time off work to look after her teenage daughter's baby, and this time he's determined to make Carly see sense before Social Services take the baby away from her

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: Security guards arrive to patrol the playground as Albert Square plans the next move. Tony tries to face up to his new responsibilities

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: Phil spends a night in jail for contempt of court. Tiffany tries to come to terms with her pregnancy. Joe's behaviour is causing concern

programme.title: Soldier, Soldier
programme.desc: The day of Major Kieran Voce and Captain Kate Butler's wedding arrives. Meanwhile, Donna Tucker starts to get closer to her tutor

programme.title: Pie in the Sky
programme.desc: Crabbe and PC Guthrie go back to school to investigate the possession of Ecstasy tablets and the beating of a police chief's son, and it is not long before Freddy Fisher finds himself under close scrutiny. Richard Griffiths stars

programme.title: Lovejoy
programme.desc: A bereaved couple hire Lovejoy to find a pair of Regency duelling pistols and bring about the downfall of a murderer - but to complete the task he is forced to risk Jane's life and fight a duel. Anthony Valentine guest stars, with Ian McShane

programme.title: Brush Strokes
programme.desc: Lionel becomes suspicious about Jacko and Sandra deciding to call off the wedding. Lesley considers getting back together with Giles, while Gloria has her own eye on Jacko

programme.title: Are You Being Served?
programme.desc: When sales figures are down along with the profits, Grace Brothers is forced to lay off staff. Mr Rumbold comes up with the ingenious plan that the employees themselves must decide who is fired. Classic British comedy, starring John Inman

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Clegg buys a metal detector, so Foggy decides to show him how it works by searching for treasure on the Pennines. Meanwhile, Compo struggles with a new pair of jeans. Comedy, starring Peter Sallis

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Compo buys Sid's wetsuit and, under Foggy's supervision, tries scuba diving and waterskiing. Bill Owen and Brian Wilde star

programme.title: Inspector George Gently
programme.desc: A murder at a Turkish baths seems like an open-and-shut case, as witnesses put an ex-serviceman at the scene of the crime and the suspect has left his ID in a locker. But as Gently and Bacchus begin their search for the man, things soon become complicated. His psychiatrist reveals he was showing signs of schizophrenia, while his brother claims he was far too soft to have killed a man - and when a second body turns up, the duo are led into a world of medical secrets at an Army testing facility. Crime drama, starring Martin Shaw and Lee Ingleby, with William Ash and Jemma Redgrave

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: The team reinvestigates the murder of a man found in an alleyway seven years previously when he is identified on a website covering unexplained disappearances. The victim is named by a woman whose husband hired him six months before his death, but neither of them had thought anything of it when their employee went missing - and seem to know little about him. Meanwhile, Brian and Gerry are distracted by looming job cuts and fear that Ucos could be downsized. With Robert Daws and Claudie Blakley

programme.title: Waking the Dead
programme.desc: Feature-length episode. Eve links DNA evidence found at a traffic collision to a murder case she worked on while examining mass graves during the Balkan War, leaving Boyd determined to track down the perpetrators, a ring of war criminals now living and working in the UK. Starring Trevor Eve and Sue Johnston, with guest stars Ron Cook, Anna Madeley and Branka Katic

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Sid Owen guest stars as the limo driver of a fading pop star who is suspected of raping a student found unconscious in an alley by Reg and Tony. programme.title: Cadfael

programme.title: Cegin Bryn
programme.desc: Chef Bryn Williams creates a series of dishes inspired by the land and sea, showing how to get the most out of local produce. He begins with salad with cob nuts and blue cheese, shows how to cook pheasant served with twice-cooked chips, and prepares a plum Bakewell tart. programme.title: Rick Stein's Cornwall
programme.desc: Rick visits Tintagel, Cornwall's most mythical place, which was an important trading port with Europe and the birthplace of perhaps Britain's greatest legend - the tale of King Arthur. He also learns how the Methodists were important to Cornwall, and how they would cook a rather unusual bun during feast days, and meets a family on the Roseland Peninsula who are continuing the surprisingly ancient tradition of growing an exotic spice - saffron

programme.title: Football Focus

programme.title: Athletics

programme.title: Tennis: Australian Open
programme.desc: Sue Barker presents action from the women's singles final at Melbourne Park in Australia, which was won by Sofia Kenin last year

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Retired couple David and Joyce's back garden in their home outside Gloucester looks more like an allotment than a garden. David is a dedicated vegetable grower and for Joyce, that means there's nowhere shady or pretty to sit and enjoy the garden. Meanwhile, David's increasing back and knee problems mean he is struggling to keep up its maintenance. Charlie Dimmock and Harry and David Rich set out to make the garden both prettier and more user friendly, all within a £3,000 budget

programme.title: Final Score
programme.desc: Jason Mohammad presents a round-up of the classified results and this afternoon's news from the Premier League, EFL and Scotland

programme.title: Celebrity Mastermind
programme.desc: John Humphrys asks the questions as four more famous faces brave the black chair in another episode of the classic quiz where celebrities donate to their chosen charities. Impressionist Jon Culshaw, Richie Anderson from BBC Radio 2, broadcaster Rachel Johnson and actor Denis Lawson answer questions on Doctor Who, The Saturdays, The Laconia incident and Miles Davis

programme.title: Catchpoint
programme.desc: Paddy McGuinness hosts a celebrity edition of the family-friendly game show combining physical fun and an exciting question mechanic, as contestants have to think fast as they answer questions while trying to catch balls of various sizes dropped from the studio ceiling. This time, England goalkeepers David James and Siobhan Chamberlain take on rugby legend James Haskell and fitness coach Chloe Madeley

programme.title: The Wall Versus Celebrities
programme.desc: Danny Dyer hosts this special celebrity edition of the game show, which sees footballing legend John Barnes and football pundit Chris Kamara teaming up to win as much cash as possible for their chosen charities. But their chances rest on the unpredictability of the Wall and their unflinching trust in one another

programme.title: Pointless Celebrities
programme.desc: Alexander Armstrong and Richard Osman present as famous faces take part in a special edition of the general knowledge quiz in which they try to come up with the least likely correct answers to a series of questions posed to members of the public. The contestants are Peter Purves, Lesley Judd, Jane Tucker, Freddy Marks, Dave Benson Phillips, Mike Read, Kirsten O'Brien and Terrence Hardiman

programme.title: Casualty
programme.desc: Fenisha and Ethan have kept their distance since Fenisha had the baby, but when their son is rushed into hospital, Fenisha realises that Ethan will be there to support her. Meanwhile, Connie is shocked by Grace's behaviour, and Rosa encourages Ollie to make a move. Starring George Rainsford, Olivia D'Lima and Amanda Mealing

programme.title: Line of Duty
programme.desc: Denton is attacked while on remand in prison awaiting trial and tells Fleming she had a relationship with a high-ranking officer - who may have reason to want her framed. After AC-12 gains access to the files on the protected witness, the evidence suggests a possible police conspiracy and the cohesion of the team is further threatened by the arrival of a former adversary. Crime drama, starring Keeley Hawes

programme.title: Match of the Day
programme.desc: Gary Lineker presents highlights of the latest Premier League matches, including Liverpool v Everton at Anfield and Southampton v Chelsea. Everton were looking for their first win away to their neighbours since 1999 and will have drawn confidence from some recent home defeats for the Reds. Southampton were looking to get back on track after a humiliating 9-0 defeat at the hands of Manchester United 17 days ago, while the Blues were hoping to move up the table under new manager Thomas Tuchel. Plus, two crucial matches in the battle to avoid relegation - Burnley v West Bromwich Albion and Fulham v Sheffield United

programme.title: Stronger (2017)
programme.desc: A man's life changes radically after he is seriously injured in the 2013 Boston Marathon Bombings. Jeff Bauman loses both his legs in the tragedy, but captures the hearts of his city and the world through his recovery, as he adjusts to his new way of life. Drama based on a true story, starring Jake Gyllenhaal

programme.title: Match of the Day
programme.desc: Gary Lineker presents highlights of the latest Premier League matches, including Liverpool v Everton at Anfield and Southampton v Chelsea.
